title: Norway beats Brazil with two goals from Haaland and advances to the World Cup quarterfinals
summary: The Norwegian team achieves its first qualification to the quarterfinals by defeating Brazil, which is eliminated in the round of sixteen.

title: 15-year-old teenager arrested for cyberattack that took down 40,000 Bandai Channel users
summary: The suspect allegedly used artificial intelligence to force the mass cancellation of accounts on the streaming service.

title: Father arrested for the death of his two young children in Isesaki, Gunma
summary: The 42-year-old man strangled his 6-year-old daughter and 3-year-old son with a tie, according to police.

title: US star player will be able to play in the World Cup after Trump's intervention with FIFA
summary: The footballer, who had received a red card, was cleared for the match against Belgium after the US president intervened.

title: Torrential rains wreak havoc in Japan: rescues, alerts, and tributes to victims
summary: A child is rescued after being swept away by a current, a teacher remembers his deceased friend, and alerts are issued in Kyushu while the eighth anniversary of the floods in Hiroshima is commemorated.

title: Artificial intelligence leads advances, investments, and controversies in Japan and the world
summary: Japanese companies invest in AI, China accelerates its development, and ethical concerns arise about its use in mathematics, law, and copyright.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo states that the 2026 World Cup will be the last of his career
summary: The Portuguese forward stated this before the match against Spain, generating great anticipation among fans.

title: Mexico and England face off in the World Cup round of 16
summary: The round of 16 match keeps fans on edge with a tight score.

title: Apprentice monk arrested for setting fire to a temple in Saga Prefecture
summary: The 28-year-old suspect stated that he was dissatisfied with the instruction he received and that he hated everything in his life.

title: Japanese Diet paralyzed and Takaichi government faces legislative crisis
summary: With 17 government bills unapproved, parties discuss an extraordinary extension of the session period.

title: Four years after Shinzo Abe's assassination, his wife asks to keep his memory alive
summary: Akie Abe led a commemorative event in which she stated that the seeds planted by her husband must bloom.

title: Trump will meet with Zelensky on June 8 within the framework of the NATO summit
summary: The US president also plans to talk with the Turkish leader and other leaders during the summit.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 3,000 dead and suspicions of official undercount
summary: There are fears that the government underestimated the magnitude of the catastrophe to avoid panic and maintain control of information.

title: OPEC+ agrees to increase oil production in August
summary: The decision seeks to normalize the market after the resumption of exports from the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Nikkei index records strong fluctuations on the Tokyo Stock Exchange
summary: Sessions alternate between falls and rebounds, while the TOPIX reaches new historic highs amid market uncertainty.

title: Tensions in Iran after the funeral of Supreme Leader Khamenei and his son's absence from the ceremony
summary: Iranian society shows divisions, while there is speculation that Mojtaba fears an Israeli attack.

title: Naomi Osaka defeats the world number one and advances to the quarterfinals at Wimbledon
summary: The Japanese tennis player achieves her best result in the London tournament by defeating the current champion.

title: Mikazuki wins reelection as governor of Shiga for fourth consecutive term
summary: The current governor prevails in the elections, and attention focuses on the future of the regional automobile tax.

title: Noto's 'Abare Matsuri' festival culminates by throwing mikoshi into the river and setting them on fire
summary: The traditional celebration attracts numerous participants who submerge in the river to then burn the floats.

title: Itoh Takumi achieves his first victory and ends Fujii Sota's streak of 14 consecutive wins
summary: The young shogi prodigy stops the champion's unbeaten run in the professional league.
